scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: chetan <sips:chetan@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sut <sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: sips:chetan@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1446028748 1 IN IP4 172.16.3.60 s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] b=TIAS:2000000 t=0 0 a=activetalker m=audio 5012 RTP/AVP 9 0 8 110 18 120 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:110 G726-32/8000 a=fmtp:110 bitrate=32000 a=fmtp:18 annexb=yes a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:60 a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP RTP/AVP a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:1RiDaCgfcNSoq8+WJ8Y72q/GwUV4hp9ODGHDTcOE UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=pcfg:2 t=2 m=video 5034 RTP/AVP 109 111 110 112 b=TIAS:1929000 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:109 H264/90000 a=fmtp:109 profile-level-id=420028 a=rtpmap:111 H264/90000 a=fmtp:111 profile-level-id=420028;packetization-mode=1 a=rtpmap:110 H264/90000 a=fmtp:110 profile-level-id=640028;packetization-mode=1 a=rtpmap:112 H264/90000 a=fmtp:112 profile-level-id=640028 a=tcap:1 RTP/SAVP a=acap:1 crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:cqKWHVwSDmK6/S2vLTMa/6Fq0dY2ZktLbJgLqKpF UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP a=pcfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=rtcp-fb:* ccm fir a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli a=rtcp-fb:* ccm tmmbr

ACK sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: chetan <sips:chetan@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sut <sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK [routes] Contact: sips:chetan@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

INVITE sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: chetan <sips:chetan@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sut <sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: sips:chetan@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]

ACK sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: chetan <sips:chetan@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sut <sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 ACK [routes] Contact: sips:chetan@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1446028748 2 IN IP4 172.16.3.60 s=- c=IN IP4 192.168.5.34 b=TIAS:2000000 t=0 0 a=activetalker m=audio 6004 RTP/SAVP 8 120 c=IN IP4 172.16.3.65 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20 a=acfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=crypto:1 AES_256_CM_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:UakMQonqXA7fsqYRs4rZ+9smRCLwWi8nKI7RpOVtH06aeZsXq2/MhlA60wPPVA== UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP m=video 6006 RTP/SAVP 109 111 110 112 c=IN IP4 0.0.0.0 b=TIAS:4096000 a=inactive a=rtpmap:109 H264/90000 a=rtpmap:111 H264/90000 a=rtpmap:110 H264/90000 a=rtpmap:112 H264/90000 a=acfg:1 t=1 a=1 a=crypto:1 AES_256_CM_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:K9ZGmjsAxYh7duZ9VAnUVbTABiVzQZmaYPbrqejZfX4SpQNug4RGiPNn9+mBYA== UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP

INVITE sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: chetan <sips:chetan@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sut <sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: sips:chetan@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 1446028748 3 IN IP4 172.16.3.60 s=- c=IN IP4 172.16.3.65 b=TIAS:2000000 t=0 0 m=audio 6004 RTP/SAVP 8 120 c=IN IP4 172.16.3.65 a=sendonly a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20 a=crypto:1 AES_256_CM_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:UakMQonqXA7fsqYRs4rZ+9smRCLwWi8nKI7RpOVtH06aeZsXq2/MhlA60wPPVA== UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP m=video 6006 RTP/SAVP 109 111 110 112 c=IN IP4 0.0.0.0 b=TIAS:4096000 a=inactive a=rtpmap:109 H264/90000 a=rtpmap:111 H264/90000 a=rtpmap:110 H264/90000 a=rtpmap:112 H264/90000 a=crypto:1 AES_256_CM_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:K9ZGmjsAxYh7duZ9VAnUVbTABiVzQZmaYPbrqejZfX4SpQNug4RGiPNn9+mBYA== UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP

ACK sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: chetan <sips:chetan@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sut <sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 ACK [routes] Contact: sips:chetan@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0

BYE sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: chetan <sips:chetan@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: sut <sips:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 4 BYE Contact: sips:chetan@[local_ip]:[local_port] [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
